message:
test: Add comprehensive unit test coverage across rch components (+2000 lines)

Expand test coverage with detailed unit tests for configuration, caching,
scheduling, alerting, and API functionality:

rch/src/cache.rs (+296 lines):
- CacheConfig default, clone, and debug tests
- CacheStats default, clone, debug, and hit_rate edge cases
- Cache entry expiration boundary tests
- Concurrent access and eviction tests

rch/src/commands.rs (+227 lines):
- Command parsing and validation tests
- Error handling and edge case coverage
- Integration with fleet operations

rch/src/fleet/mod.rs (+158 lines):
- Fleet state management tests
- Worker allocation and deallocation tests
- Failure recovery scenarios

rchd/src/benchmark_scheduler.rs (+576 lines):
- BenchmarkPriority ordering and equality tests
- BenchmarkReason clone, debug, display for all variants
- Scheduler state transitions
- Priority queue behavior
- Failure threshold and retry logic

rchd/src/benchmark_queue.rs (+264 lines):
- Queue enqueue/dequeue operations
- Priority ordering verification
- Capacity limits and overflow handling

rchd/src/alerts.rs (+180 lines):
- Alert triggering conditions
- Notification delivery tests
- Throttling and deduplication

rchd/src/http_api.rs (+371 lines):
- HTTP endpoint routing tests
- Request validation
- Response formatting
- Authentication and authorization

Other files: Minor test utilities and helper adjustments.

Also update Cargo.lock with test dependencies and sync beads issues.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
